title: RSSB LDC / Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026 Government Jobs in Rajasthan Apply Now
excerpt: Rajasthan Staff Selection Board RSSB has released the LDC / Junior Assistant Notification 2026. Apply Online from 15 January 2026 to 13 February 2026.
value_prop: _Apply for **RSSB LDC / Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026** and get a chance to work with the **Rajasthan** government_

About Organization

Rajasthan Staff Selection Board is a government organization that conducts recruitment exams for various posts in the state of Rajasthan.
The organization is responsible for selecting eligible candidates for different government jobs in Rajasthan.

About the Programme

The RSSB LDC / Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for candidates who have passed 10+2 from any recognized board/university in India.
The programme aims to select eligible candidates for the posts of LDC and Junior Assistant in various government departments in Rajasthan.
